artifact: Lists Vintage legality status for single-faced artifact cards.
sql: SELECT c.name, l.status FROM cards AS c JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.types = 'Artifact' AND c.side IS NULL AND l.format = 'vintage';

raw_response.sql: SELECT c.name, l.status FROM cards AS c JOIN legalities AS l ON c.uuid = l.uuid WHERE c.types = 'Artifact' AND c.side IS NULL AND l.format = 'vintage';
raw_response.artifact: Lists Vintage legality status for single-faced artifact cards.

token_notes: Codex sub-agent token usage is visible to the Codex product, not to this local Node runner.
